BYOK · no backend · no telemetry.

items.title: Green-PT/honey-for-devs
items.abstract_or_description: Honey (I Shrunk the AI) by GreenPT: a cross-tool coding skill that cuts AI coding-agent token usage and LLM API costs — write less code, less prose, and denser agent-to-agent handoffs (−53%, lossless in benchmarks) with no loss of quality. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Codex, Gemini CLI, Windsurf, Cline & Kiro.
